original_final_question: Which Texas cities had diabetes prevalence above 12% in each year from 2016 through 2019 and also had 2020 Census populations under 100,000? List the city names in alphabetical order separated by `, `. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify Texas cities with diabetes prevalence above 12 percent in 2016.
2. From those cities, keep the ones with diabetes prevalence above 12 percent in 2017.
3. From the remaining cities, keep the ones with diabetes prevalence above 12 percent in 2018.
4. From the remaining cities, keep the ones with diabetes prevalence above 12 percent in 2019.
5. Using 2020 Census place population data, keep the remaining cities with population under 100,000 and return their names in alphabetical order, separated by comma and space.

Node 2: TX cities with diabetes > 12% in 2017 release
Node 3: TX cities with diabetes > 12% in 2018 release
Node 4: TX cities with diabetes > 12% in 2019 release
